metadata.name: API-Mediated Access Control
metadata.description: Prevents direct database connections between services. Cross-service data access must go through published API endpoints.

control.assertion: No 'connects' relationship with protocol JDBC may exist between two 'service' nodes. JDBC connections are only permitted from a service to its own database.
control.remediation: Replace direct database access with a REST API call to the owning service. Add the integration to cross-service-calls.yaml and the target service's OpenAPI spec.
